raw_consumer_statement: At the end of XXXX, I bought an item through XXXX. The delivery showed that it was " Left in locker/storage. '' on XX/XX/XXXX, but the mailroom/locker room did not receive the any package from XXXX XXXX XXXX for me. Then I contacted XXXX, and XXXX asked me to contact the bank to dispute it. So I disputed the expense and provided the purchase receipt and the historical screenshots of the deliveries of the mailroom/locker room to prove that there was no delivery on XX/XX/XXXX. After waiting for a month, Amex automatically rejected the dispute without any phone call or email updates. Soon after, I contacted Amex to ask the reason for the rejection, but Amex refused to provide the reason and asked me to reopen the dispute and provide documents again. So I asked Amex if they could tell me if there was any problem with the documents I provided before? But Amex still refused to answer. Then I asked if I could contact or communicate with the team that handled my dispute. Amex still refused and said that they could not contact the people from dispute team. Finally, I asked what documents were valid or could prove that I did not receive the delivery. Amex refused to provide any information and asked me to prepare all the documents I could provide myself. I tried to seek help, but Amex refused to provide any information and kept claiming that everything I said was noted down and someone would be there to check it. However, any questions I asked about the dispute were refused to answer.
